---
title: "Command Reference"
description: "Source-derived inventory of actions and definitions registered by OPALX."
audience: user
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-23"
---

The executable registers parser exemplars in
`opalx/src/OpalConfigure/Configure.cpp`. This inventory is deliberately limited
to that current OPALX registration point.

## Actions

| Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`CALL`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#call-statement) | Read and execute another input source. |
| [`DUMPEMFIELDS`](../user-guide/diagnostics-output.qmd#dumpemfields-command) | Request electromagnetic-field output. |
| [`ECHO`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#echo-statement) | Write input-language text to the log. |
| [`HELP`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#help-command) | Request parser help. |
| [`OPTION`](../user-guide/options.qmd) | Configure global runtime behavior. |
| [`SELECT`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#select-element-selection) | Select output or object state. |
| [`STOP`, `QUIT`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#stop-quit) | Stop or leave input processing. |
| [`PSYSTEM`, `SYSTEM`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#system) | Invoke supported system actions. |
| [`TITLE`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#title-statement) | Attach a title to the calculation. |
| [`TRACK`](../user-guide/tracking.qmd) | Enter a tracking block. |
| [`VALUE`](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd#value-output-of-expressions) | Inspect or emit expression values. |

## Definitions

The current registry provides [values, constants, variables, and
macros](../user-guide/control-statements/index.qmd), plus [`BEAM`](../user-guide/beam.qmd),
[`DISTRIBUTION`, `EMISSIONSOURCE`, and
`EMISSIONSOURCELIST`](../user-guide/beam-distributions.qmd),
[`FIELDSOLVER`](../user-guide/field-solver/index.qmd), and
[`BINNING`](../user-guide/structures/index.qmd#binning). [`LINE`](../user-guide/beam-lines/index.qmd)
assembles elements into a beamline. The complete statement catalog is in
[Input Language and Execution](../user-guide/input-language.qmd).

The following high-use interfaces already have source-audited tables:

- [Beam Definitions](../user-guide/beam.qmd)
- [Tracking](../user-guide/tracking.qmd)
- [Runtime Options](../user-guide/options.qmd)
- [Field Output Commands](../user-guide/diagnostics-output.qmd)
- [Elements](../user-guide/elements.qmd)
- [Structures / Binning](../user-guide/structures/index.qmd#binning)
